content.en:
The years passed.

In the blink of an eye, more than 10,000 Primordial Era had passed.

With the experience of creating endless golden light last time, this time Ye Tian created another primordial mastery technique of the same level, but it was a defensive primordial mastery technique - Endless Light Shield!

The defensive effect of the Infinite Mask is even far greater than that of the Glass Shield, and can be used as a hole card.

Then, more than 10,000 Primordial Realm Epochs passed, and Ye Tian created the third Primordial Control Technique involving three hundred and sixty-five Extreme Extremes—Endless Extreme Speed!

At this point, Ye Tian possessed three primordial control techniques involving three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes.

At this moment, his strength reached an unimaginable level.

"It's almost time, Feng Ming Ancestor said that after this period of time, he can go to the Quadruple Ancestor. If there's anything important, I'm sure I'll announce it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Sure enough, on this day, Feng Ming Origin Ancestor and other Five Origin Ancestors gathered their group of Holy Sons.

......

Temple of False Teeth.

Ye Tian and the other holy sons came, and saw a fivefold ancestor.

These Fivefold Primordial Ancestors reined in their aura, so Ye Tian and the other Triple Primordial Ancestors didn't feel too majestic aura, otherwise the aura of the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor was not something they could bear.

"I've seen all the elders!"

One by one, the Holy Son said respectfully.

At this time, the Five-Fold Origin Ancestor Feng Ming Origin Ancestor spoke: "I reminded you before that you are not allowed to attack the Fourfold Origin Ancestor, you should all be very confused, so I will tell you this time." A war broke out between the Upper Spirit Origin Domain and another powerful force belonging to the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, and finally snatched a newly born supreme treasure land. In this supreme treasure land, we found many precious treasures, such as the Primal Gold Liquid, which helped to condense the Second Natal Primordial Mastery Technique. "

"Second Natal Primordial Mastery Technique?"

Many of the Sons were shocked.

Isn't there only one Natal Primordial Mastery Technique?

The natal primordial control technique is far beyond the ordinary primordial mastery technique, if there is a second natal primordial mastery skill, the strength will inevitably increase greatly!

They didn't ask, because Feng Ming's original ancestor would definitely explain.

I saw Feng Ming Origin Ancestor continue: "Under normal circumstances, the Triple Origin Ancestor can only have one Natal Origin Control Technique, but the Taishi Golden Liquid is too rare, so this information is rarely transmitted. As long as there is enough Taishi Gold Liquid, you can condense the second Natal Primordial Mastery Technique and the third Natal Primordial Mastery Technique. And a few more natal primordial mastery skills are not only an increase in combat effectiveness, but also an increase in potential and an improvement in foundation. Not only that, but if you absorb enough Taishi Golden Liquid, you can absorb it and create a more perfect foundation, which will help you impact the Fivefold Origin Ancestor in the future. Of course, in addition to the Origin Gold Liquid, there are also items that are helpful to all of us Fivefold Ancestors, and we will give you a list, and when the time comes, you will bring these treasures out, and the Void Tooth Holy Gate will give you enough benefits. In addition to the treasures on the list, all the other treasures you have acquired belong to you, including the Origin Gold Liquid!"

When many holy sons heard this, they were all very excited.

The value of this Taishi gold liquid is inevitably too high, and their luck is too good to encounter such a good thing!

If they hit the Fourfold Ancestor, then this advantage and chance will have nothing to do with them!

"Taishi Golden Liquid, it can even form the second Natal Primordial Control Technique, the third Natal Primordial Mastery Technique, but it's a pity that there was only one Primordial Mastery Technique turned into a Natal Primordial Mastery Technique, but I didn't expect this to have a solution!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Fortunately, he joined the Void Tooth Holy Gate, otherwise he would have been unable to bear it early and directly hit the Quadruple Ancestor!

However, Ye Tian also noticed that although some of the Holy Sons looked shocked, they were actually pretending, and they obviously knew about this matter for a long time.

"It seems that these Holy Sons have been vigorously cultivated, and they have obtained this information early, and they have been improving their strength in order to enter that supreme treasure land!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And the reason why he didn't get such a cultivation is that he probably just joined the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and he only revealed seventy-two extreme extreme paths, although his strength is very strong, but it may not be in the eyes of Fengming's original ancestors.

What they needed was a more powerful Triple Ancestor, a Triple Ancestor who truly had the ability to rule.

And the strength he exposed did not meet this standard, and it was too late.

In the eyes of the Fivefold Origin Ancestors, the mere tens of thousands of Primordial Realm Epochs were just a blink of an eye, and even if they were allowed to cultivate them personally, they would not be able to make a Triple Origin Ancestor skyrocket in strength.

That's why he wasn't chosen.

"It doesn't matter, as long as you can enter that supreme treasure land, the Taishi Golden Liquid will definitely belong to me!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

Feng Ming Origin Ancestor reminded again: "Remember, your enemies this time are not only the Holy Sons of the other Fivefold Holy Gates, but it is even possible to face the Triple Origin Ancestors outside the Upper Spirit Origin Domain. Although we occupy it, the enemy may have a way to send the Triple Ancestor in, but they can't send people in on a large scale, so you have the advantage in numbers. In short, as the sons of the Void Tooth Gate, try not to fight each other. "

Try not to fight!

But if you really encounter the supreme treasure, who cares?

A few more Origin Realm Days passed, and the Void Tooth Holy Gate sent more than thirty Fivefold Origin Ancestors to bring their group of Holy Sons and a large number of True Disciples.

That's right, the true disciples are also qualified to go over, although they are cannon fodder, but they also hope to snatch some good things, and maybe they can also bring out the resources that the five ancestors need.

Therefore, if you can send it in, you can send it in, anyway, there are many places in the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

......

"It's here!"

Ye Tian and the other Triple Ancestors came to a certain area of the Primordial Black Sea.

Here, the Triple Ancestors of the Fivefold Holy Gate also came here.

All six fivefold holy gates have arrived!

Ye Tian looked around, his eyes focused on the Triple Ancestors of the Upper Spirit Holy Gate.

Among the six fivefold holy gates, the Void Tooth Holy Gate has the lowest heritage and the smallest number of Holy Sons, while the Upper Spirit Holy Gate is definitely the oldest and most powerful Holy Gate.

For example, this time, the number of Holy Sons who have comprehended the seventy-two extreme extreme paths in the Spiritual Holy Gate has reached more than 800, what a terrifying number!

There are less than a hundred sons of the Void Tooth Holy Gate!

Of course, this is the total number of Holy Sons, and the Triple Origin Divine Sons are less.

For example, the Triple Ancestor Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate is only thirty-seven.

However, there were probably more than three hundred Triple Ancestor Holy Sons of the Upper Spirit Holy Gate, and the number directly crushed the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

After the five holy gates were all gathered, Feng Ming Yuan Ancestor said, "Since they are all here, let's open the magic array!"

They had spent countless energy to arrange this magic circle, completely protecting this supreme treasure land, and only allowing the development of the fivefold holy gate of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, so this supreme treasure land was only now opened.

Bang!!!

The circle opened, allowing the Triple Ancestors to enter.

And with this magic circle barrier, even the Fivefold Primordial Ancestors couldn't kill them in the outside world.

Otherwise, with the great power of the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, even if it is in the treasure land, the Pentfold Ancestor can't enter, and he can penetrate a trace of power and kill the Triple Primordial Ancestor in seconds.
